reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: You do not have authority for this action.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Request appropriate grant or choose a permitted action.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show blocked state and do not retry automatically.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: This action needs human approval before it can continue.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Policy allows action only after human approval.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Route for approval and then re-submit with approval reference.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: More evidence is needed before this can be accepted.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Evidence sufficiency gate failed for requested promotion/publication.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Attach required evidence or mark review-required.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show evidence-needed state; do not claim accepted fact.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: An identity could not be matched safely.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Source/local/external identity binding is unresolved or ambiguous.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Resolve or review identity binding before promotion.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show unresolved identity; do not merge silently.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: A unit could not be resolved.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Unit or quantity kind is missing or not bound to governed unit reference.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Select or bind a governed unit before calculation.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: This view may be out of date.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Refresh materialization or use canonical reconstruction for high-consequence output.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show stale badge; block high-consequence use if returned as stale blocking.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: Active rules conflict and must be reviewed.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Pack/profile activation or merge produced unresolved conflict.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Run pack activation plan and governance review.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show conflict state; do not resolve in app code.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: Imported data is saved as a candidate, not accepted truth.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Import path preserved source data but did not promote to accepted OFARM assertion.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Submit for review/promotion if authoritative use is required.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: Some source detail could not be mapped exactly.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Loss map indicates semantic or structural loss in source mapping.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Review loss map before high-consequence use.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show mapping-loss warning and block compliance-grade use if required.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: Some information is restricted and cannot be shown.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Query/result includes data hidden by authorization, tenant, or sovereignty rule.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Display permission-limited state; do not infer hidden values.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show restricted data state, not 'no data'.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: This high-consequence output is blocked until required checks pass.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Publication/commit/calculation requires stronger basis, approval, or freshness.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Resolve listed problems and rerun dry-run/preflight.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: This request was already processed; the prior result is reused.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Same idempotency key and payload matched prior accepted processing.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show existing result; do not create duplicate fact.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: This retry conflicts with a previous request.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Same idempotency key reused with materially different payload.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Review duplicate/conflict and create a new request if appropriate.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show conflict; do not retry automatically.

reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Record has open dispute and should not be displayed as settled accepted fact without posture.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show under-dispute badge and block unqualified compliance claim if policy requires.
